our products

Quick Ship & Custom

Quick ship ships in 2 to 4 weeks: Stadium, Elite & Model X in 24" width, Light Gray or Dark Gray. Custom orders are 8–12 weeks: any size, any wood, or materials. Price match guarantee on USA competitors.

Stadium From $649

Specifications
  • Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D
  • Base: optional 4" high base can be added
  • Weight: approx. 175 lbs
  • Quick Ship (2–4 weeks): 24" width, Light Gray or Dark Gray
  • Base price: $649 · Quick ship (24"): $749 (includes accessories) · Colors: Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
  • Custom: 8–12 weeks — any size, any wood, or materials

Accessories

Lock Box & Stick Rack

View accessories →

finishing touches

locker accessories

Dial in every detail – airflow, storage, comfort, and branding.

Cushions

+ $75.00 (top or bottom) / $150.00 (both)

High-density foam cushions upholstered for comfort and durability – available on the top, bottom, or both.

Coat Rod

Call for pricing

Heavy-duty coat rod for jerseys, jackets, and gear – sized to match each locker style.

Hooks

Call for pricing

Additional interior hooks for bags, helmets, and everyday gear, matched to your locker layout.

Name Plate

+ $10.00

Clean, simple name plate for player identification – ideal for teams that want a classic, organized look.

Skate Hooks

+ $25.00

Additional wall-mounted hooks positioned for skates or gear, perfect for hockey or figure skating locker rooms.

Custom Logo

+ $75.00

Team or program branding applied to the locker face – reinforce your identity every time players walk in.

Lock Box & Stick Rack

Lock box with digital key lock (+$80) and stick rack (from $299). View details and request a quote.

View accessories →

Get a free custom design consultation. Our team will help you choose the perfect locker solution for your program and budget.
